meaning: n.瀹樺儦,瀹樺儦浣滈,瀹樺儦鏈烘瀯
examples: They are faced with a mountain of bureaucracy.
Bureaucracy can entangle applications for months.
We need to free business from the dead hand of bureaucracy.
It's as if someone was trying to parody right-wing narratives of government bureaucracy and incompetence.
The military procurement bureaucracy apparently cannot come up with a set top decoding box quickly enough.
